🚀 NEW OPPORTUNITY: Python FastAPI Engineer (ML + Risk Modeling)

📍 Location: Remote
⏰ Duration: Contract
🏢 Work Arrangement: remote
💰 Compensation: $63/hr (C2C · No Benefits)

📋 QUALIFICATIONS:
• 8-10

🛠️ REQUIRED SKILLS:
• Python
• FastAPI
• REST APIs
• Machine Learning
• risk scoring
• classification/regression
• unit/integration testing
• Git-based workflows
• +11 more skills

📋 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
• Design and develop REST APIs using Python + FastAPI to serve real time model scoring for individual loans/customers and support batch scoring workloads.
• Integrate APIs with upstream/downstream systems and ensure strong input validation and error handling.
• Support model hosting & execution for Python-based models and enable flexible deployment patterns
• Implement model operational capabilities: versioning/lineage, audit trails, reason codes/explainability hooks, and champion challenger support where needed.
• Build/enable observability: structured logging, metrics, tracing, and monitoring for performance, availability, and usage; help implement model performance/drift monitoring pipelines.

👉 Ready to join our innovative team?
Send your resume to: kumar@itvisiongroup.com

💬 Drop a comment: Why are you perfect for this role?

Jitender Bhatia

CEO & Founder | Salesforce Architect at Forcecraver | Expert in Salesforce, DataCloud, Agentforce, SAP, Oracle, Full Stack Development, Data Science & Engineering | Transforming CRM & Tech Solutions

🚀 Hiring: Senior Data Scientist | 6+ Years Experience | Remote

#Forcecraver is looking for an experienced Senior Data Scientist to join a consulting team focused on solving high-impact client problems through predictive modelling, experimentation, and scalable ML deployment.

📍 Location: Remote
🧑‍💻 Experience: 6+ Years
🌏 Candidates: India-based applicants only

Key Responsibilities

• Lead end-to-end ML projects including problem framing, data acquisition, feature engineering, model development, validation, and deployment.
• Build and optimize machine learning models (classification, regression, time-series, ensemble methods).
• Collaborate with engineering teams to productionize models using APIs, containers, and CI/CD pipelines.
• Conduct model validation, A/B testing, and experimentation to measure business impact.
• Mentor junior data scientists and establish best practices for ML lifecycle, documentation, and governance.
• Present actionable insights and recommendations to technical and business stakeholders.

Required Skills

• Strong Python expertise for data science (Pandas, NumPy).
• Advanced SQL for data extraction, transformation, and performance tuning.
• Experience with scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and machine learning model development.
• Strong foundation in statistics, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
• Experience deploying ML models using APIs, containers, and CI/CD concepts.

Preferred Skills

• Experience with PySpark or distributed data processing.
• Familiarity with AWS, GCP, or Azure and MLOps tools.

📩 Please reach out to me at +919899634637 or jbhatia@forcecraver.com to discuss further.
🔔 Follow @Jitender Bhatia @Forcecraver Technologies for more job updates.

#Forcecraver #Hiring #RemoteJobs #DataScientist #MachineLearning #Python #SQL #MLOps #IndiaJobs #AIJobs
